name: Chocolate Chip Streusel Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and lightly flour a 13x9 pan. In a small bowl, combine all streusel ingredients; mix well. Set aside. In a large bowl, combine all coffee cake ingredients. Mix until moistened. Beat for 2 minutes at high speed. Pour 2/3 of the batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle with half of the streusel mixture. Repeat with remaining batter and top with streusel mixture. Bake for 35-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
